title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/memory_retrieval.py (第 470 至 633 行，共 633 行) ---
 470 |     def _calculate_text_bm25_score(self, query_terms: List[str], text: str) -> float:
 471 |         doc_terms = self._tokenize(text)
 472 |         if not query_terms or not doc_terms:
 473 |             return 0.0
 474 |         term_freq: Dict[str, int] = {}
 475 |         for term in doc_terms:
 476 |             term_freq[term] = term_freq.get(term, 0) + 1
 477 |         score = 0.0
 478 |         for term in query_terms:
 479 |             if term in term_freq:
 480 |                 tf = term_freq[term]
 481 |                 score += (tf * 2.5) / (tf + 1.5)
 482 |         return score
 483 | 
 484 |     def _file_match_score(self, doc: MemoryDocument, normalized_file: str) -> float:
 485 |         for candidate in doc.files:
 486 |             normalized_candidate = self._normalize_path(candidate)
 487 |             if normalized_candidate == normalized_file:
 488 |                 return 1.2
 489 |             if normalized_file in normalized_candidate or normalized_candidate in normalized_file:
 490 |                 return 0.75
 491 |             if normalized_candidate.split("/")[-1] == normalized_file.split("/")[-1]:
 492 |                 return 0.45
 493 |         return 0.0
 494 | 
 495 |     def _error_match_score(self, doc: MemoryDocument, normalized_error: str) -> float:
 496 |         haystack = " ".join(doc.error_types + doc.concepts + [doc.content]).lower()
 497 |         if not normalized_error:
 498 |             return 0.0
 499 |         if normalized_error in haystack:
 500 |             return 1.1
 501 |         tokens = self._tokenize(normalized_error)
 502 |         if tokens and any(token in haystack for token in tokens):
 503 |             return 0.55
 504 |         return 0.0
 505 | 
 506 |     def _recency_weight(self, timestamp: str) -> float:
 507 |         if not timestamp:
 508 |             return 0.0
 509 |         try:
 510 |             ts = datetime.fromisoformat(timestamp)
 511 |         except Exception:
 512 |             return 0.0
 513 |         age_days = max((datetime.now() - ts).days, 0)
 514 |         return max(0.0, 0.2 - min(age_days, 30) * 0.005)
 515 | 
 516 |     def _type_weight(self, kind: str, query: str) -> float:
 517 |         q = (query or "").lower()
 518 |         if kind == MemoryKind.BUG.value and any(word in q for word in ["error", "exception", "失败", "错误", "bug"]):
 519 |             return 0.35
 520 |         if kind == MemoryKind.ARCHITECTURE.value and any(word in q for word in ["架构", "architecture", "设计"]):
 521 |             return 0.3
 522 |         if kind == MemoryKind.WORKFLOW.value and any(word in q for word in ["流程", "workflow", "pytest", "测试"]):
 523 |             return 0.25
 524 |         return 0.0
 525 | 
 526 |     @staticmethod
 527 |     def _normalize_path(path: Optional[str]) -> str:
 528 |         return (path or "").replace("\\", "/").lower().strip()
 529 | 
 530 |     def retrieve_by_file_path(
 531 |         self,
 532 |         file_path: str,
 533 |         top_k: int = 5
 534 |     ) -> List[Tuple[SessionSummary, float, str]]:
 535 |         """
 536 |         根据文件路径检索相关摘要
 537 | 
 538 |         Args:
 539 |             file_path: 文件路径
 540 |             top_k: 返回结果数量
 541 | 
 542 |         Returns:
 543 |             元组列表：(摘要, 相关性分数, 来源层)
 544 |         """
 545 |         results = []
 546 | 
 547 |         # 1. 检索情景记忆
 548 |         for summary in self.episodic_memory.get_all():
 549 |             for fc in summary.files_changed:
 550 |                 if file_path in fc.path:
 551 |                     score = 1.0 if fc.path == file_path else 0.5
 552 |                     results.append((summary, score, "episodic"))
 553 |                     break
 554 | 
 555 |         # 2. 检索长期记忆
 556 |         if len(results) < top_k:
 557 |             # 使用文件名作为关键词搜索
 558 |             filename = file_path.split("/")[-1].split("\\")[-1]
 559 |             long_term_results =...
